detaileddescription.para: All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. See standard-version for commit guidelines.

listitem.para: add predefined events inside storage scope endpoints (a8073e4)
Login: add CreateHeadless param (4110102)
login: add setter for autoLogin create headless (63fa44b)
Login: login using code that is generated from a publisher namespace token (b471ce8)
fixed cache token (1cba87d)
fixed member settings were not being handled correctly (fda0f46)
CloudSave: refine conditional check and logging (9c9733e)
add bulk query user presence (fb61d9d)
check user availability (21311d4)
MPv2: listen to V2GameSessionRejectedNotif and trigger OnSessionInviteRejected delegates (13bab24)
predefinedEvent: add some implementations on Engagement Leaderboard, Seasonpass, and Reward scope (b8abde8)
predefinedEvent: trigger events for chatv2 scope (50bd442)
SessionInterface: separate the function to SendServerReady (031880e)
SessionV2: add a reminder to prevent DS that forgot to set server as ready (14c2e41)
fixed cache token (037a150)
missing undef online error / #undef ONLINE_ERROR_NAMESPACE in some ecommerce async classes (7b4c326)
MPv2: return session leader id for game and party session (c6a6338)
predefinedEvent: fix preDefinedEventName for cached event (b09a863)
predefinedEvent: move predefinedEvent name inside the payload (6cb30b6)
SessionV2: change on the RegisterServer. Either do nothing, or fast forward to SendServerFunction. ConnectToDSHub() is automatically handled by each async task on Finalize() (2d65317)
SessionV2: flip the default behavior, set server ready is manual and recommended to disabled. (previous: manual set server ready is required) (ecd1e53)
trigger OnBlockListChangeDelegates only if the list changed (3b28f41)
Adding Support for Multiple Currencies by using Search Item in Store Offer (7af6980)
ecommerce: Flexible bundle pricing (8c5f909)
epic games sync dlc (3af5262)
MPv2: add method to set DS session ready manually (da7a603)
predefinedEvent: add some models on Engagement Achievement scope (4cf5f06)
predefinedEvent: integrate some models on Engagement Group scope (f32d7d5)
PredefinedEvent: send event payloads for Play scope (9ab83e6)
fix DS unable to update session with empty teams (edfae97)
Incorrect include paths (9abe1a4)
missing undef online error / #undef ONLINE_ERROR_NAMESPACE in some ecommerce async classes (1a28117)
MPv2: clear CurrentMatchmakingHandle on leave session (13ab409)
MPv2: store delegates as member variables to keep its lifetime as long as the async task alive (2f7356e)
predefinedEvent: fix preDefinedEventName for cached event (5a6a171)
predefinedEvent: move predefinedEvent name inside the payload (317e60a)
crash when logout after subsystem is destroyed (4582f16)
add SyncThirdPartyPlatformFriendV2 (5fd0e85)
GroupInterface [See Description] (3241f61)
GroupInterface adding comments (3708d2b)
GroupInterface adding FScopeLock for arrays (6bf5b9a)
GroupInterface adding more critical sections and fixing spelling errors (9b0509b)
GroupInterface Adding TRACE (af20a78)
GroupInterface Cancel Join Request and Query Group Join Requests (35afdbf)
GroupInterface FindGroups (a6bfdd5)
GroupInterface GetGroupMembersByGroupIds (90a8002)
GroupInterface getting rid of hardcoded success status (67a80e7)
GroupInterface more cleanup (d1dc436)
GroupInterface Query Group Info (5769bf1)
GroupInterface rebase with master (b7c4090)
GroupInterface Some cleanup and standardization (4cce847)
GroupInterface some logging and reorganizing (03c1b83)
GroupInterface Update Group Info (3c224b9)
MPv2: implement session storage for leader and member (44faf9c)
predefinedEvent: send predefined event payload on storage scope (e22327f)
execute leave party delegate have wrong success state (6e3f657)
fix error code reporting when join session responded with error (a44fbe2)
prevent destroying session when a session is still in creating state (426c51f)
set async task success to false when session instance is invalid (297b6d0)
trigger session error delegates in failed scenario (b188f32)
accelByteSubsystem: init localUserNumCached to -1 before no one login, set localUserNumCached after successfully logged in as server, reset it to -1 when user logged out (91053ce)
add FOnlineSessionV2AccelByte::ContainedMember to check if a player is a session member in DS (6f7eacd)
add predefined event interface (5f40f14)
MPv2: implement session storage for leader and member (267a6d6)
predefinedEvent: send event payload for sdkInitialized, LoginSucceded, LoginFailed, AgreementNotAccepted, AgreementAccepted (f7a4e35)
move commit hash of sdk (bc8198c)
Statistics: Change the flow after updating multiple stat item (4322d73)
renamed FOnlineSessionV2AccelByte::ContainedMember to SessionContainsMember (0ab7f4c)
deprecation warning for IWYU support in Unreal Engine 5.2 (03800e7)
add FOnlineSessionV2AccelByte::ContainedMember to check if a player is a session member in DS (25bfbca)
AsyncTask: refactor achievement, agreement,auth, chat along with the interface (1edf3b0)
GroupInterface Invite (487356a)
GroupInterface Invite (62f711e)
GroupInterface Invite (e49cf88)
GroupInterface Promote Demote Kick Member (c5789bc)
GroupInterface Promote, Demote, Kick, Invite (783e065)
GroupInterface Promote, Demote, Kick, Invite (744252c)
GroupInterface Promote, Demote, Kick, Invite, Delete (b82dae4)
GroupInterface Promote, Demote, Kick, Invite, Delete (0b4a63b)
handle error when friend request limit reached (6193431)
UserAsyncTask: refactor and use Epic Task (768797b)
AsyncTaskLogin: wrong passed variable (ef50b1e)
change I64d to lli (1a3f315)
if ams flag enabled, the server cannot register as local server. (0099b9f)
incorrect display name on user cache (4c4726e)
partyInterface: add scopelock to prevent incoming PartyLeaveNotif causes racing condition (0930946)
QueryUserInfo: public code is overridden an become empty due to missing field (2f2ae77)
remove 'using namespace' in public header (c219edc)
Statistics: Change the flow after updating multiple stat item (3387918)
renamed FOnlineSessionV2AccelByte::ContainedMember to SessionContainsMember (b1d8b23)
missing headers on several files using Unreal Engine 5.2 (2f05c1d)
missing functions in Group Interface for Unreal Engine 5 (7ad889d)
AuthHandler: AccelByte AuthHandlerComponent to verify players using JWT (Access token) (1d348a0)
GroupInterface LeaveGroup (79d5766)
Support EOS integration as native platform in AB OSS (afc62ba)
fix missing session attribute with key length equal to an AccelByte ID (97937e3)
fix typo include file (fa7effb)
incorrect display name on user cache (c0cc1e0)
MPv2: set LocalOwnerId for auto joined game session (bf6d440)
MPv2: handle auto join game session (a8bd08b)
implement online error accelbyte to identity and agreement interface (b3286c6)
introduce CreateAndDispatch generic and Epic Task manager (43b553f)
MPv2: call new accept backfill proposal from SDK and update internal game session after accepting backfill (b0469fd)
redirect readme to docs portal (e9bb731)
SessionV2: add GetMyActiveMatchTicket (ee736d7)
MMv2: fix potential hang in matchmaking process when notifications arrive out of order (71a3023)
MMv2: potential case where matchmaking start notification would come after cancel, leading to stuck state (046a22e)
MPv2: potential crash when attempting to fill member settings (437e698)
skip adding teams in session update request when joinability is closed (b453291)
Remove invite_only joinable validation check when creating v2 party session. (6eee4c5)
fix typo include file (7dc16b7)
AMS: add config to enable/disable AMS (090cc7b)
AMS: send ready message async on registering server (7202fb9)
launcher: get auth code either from command line or environment variable (05f2e16)
implement game session code management in OSS (a925d0e)
MPv2: implement per-member settings for sessions (153d6b6)
MPv2: SessionV2 join error handling to EOnJoinSessionCompleteResult (6ef8f84)
make sure localUserId still valid when remove party on lobby disconnect (fb1ce8d)
move TriggerOnLogoutCompleteDelegates after SetLoginStatus, add guard before use ApiClient on Lobby ConnectionClosed (0f2ae8d)
MPv2: avoid unnacesarry ensure triggered when JoinSessionResult not success (f86e5f7)
static cast ErrorCode on JoinGameSessionError (2a63265)
Add GetLinkedAccountAuthToken in the Identity Interface (e301422)
Add some functionalities to set OnlineSessionSettings with array of strings and doubles (7813570)
Adding initial WIP Groups Interface that assigns basic leader on create (95b1df7)
exposed linking/unlinking other platform (1ff659a)
Group Interface Create Group Test (f1166a1)
Group Interface: Setting return status and cleaning up testing (dfecc89)
GroupInteface error codes (042d79a)
GroupInterface - Removing hardcoded group role id (813b2d2)
GroupInterface adding change to update branch names (c2498c1)
GroupInterface adding generic unreal CreateGroup option (61deade)
GroupInterface Create and some cleanup (055253d)
GroupInterface Create Group (d6a9a1b)
GroupInterface Create Group (32f1a1e)
GroupInterface CreateGroup (d9315ce)
GroupInterface CreateGroup (7b1b0a9)
GroupInterface creating generic CreateGroup method (840a6a2)
GroupInterface fixing null check (544b70e)
GroupInterface removing unused variable for jenkins (df02bba)
Login: implement steam callback on GetAuthSessionTicket (32ab627)
MMv2: add matchpool info in current matchmaking search handle (032bc03)
OSS listen to DSHub SESSION_MEMBER_CHANGED (a065beb)
Check Identity Interface validity in the GetApiClient (e179fde)
move TriggerOnLogoutCompleteDelegates after SetLoginStatus, add guard before use ApiClient on Lobby ConnectionClosed (a6db8d6)
renaming Blacklist to Denylist in Groups Interface due to changes in Unreal Engine 5 (9e0fe96)
fix the ambiguity error on 5.2 (8ebcf25)
incorrect Type in FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser (b63a451)
fix compile error on unreal ver 5.2 (79e6a2e)
missing IVoiceChat method implementation in UE5 (cf79ade)
VoiceChat: Implement IVoiceChat wrapper (ac17c5f)
MPv2: add delegate to handle stale session on refresh (6fefe26)
MPv2: add promote game session leader API to session interface (425c4b0)
update OSS implementation to support Unreal Engine 5.2 (ba9b3c0)
voicechat: implement voice chat interface (4fd2654)
log: fix string format (83e7b96)
Login: apiClient became null and causing crash when the loading takes too long (d44c604)
MPv2: ignore sessions still in creating or destroying state when ticking (41dc042)
AMS: change ServerWatchdog to ServerAMS (48b2775)
compile errors on shipping build with Linux platform due to missing override in Achievements Interface (56e3d9c)
compile warnings due to deprecation warnings on Linux dedicated server (40f967c)
incorrect base constructor params in the AsyncTasks (b899984)
UserCache: get null on uniqueNetId after logging in using deviceId (f374a88)
session: add server query game and party sessions in session interface v2 (98bb66e)
MMv1: Remove trigger OnCancelMatchmakingComplete after receive CancelMatchmakingResponse (4292b0a)
User: CachedUserInfo might return nullptr (9115f05)
MMv2: TriggerOnMatchmakingStartedDelegates in StartV2Matchmaking async task when have no party sessionId (2410bbb)
MMv2: start matchmaking no longer fails when already in a game session
MMv2: Remove failing start matchmaking request when already in a game session (6484f0d)
MPv2: only trigger OnMatchmakingStarted when lobby send corresponding notification (b717a57)
statistic: fix some statistic asynctask behavior that make task can't be finished (6ac3a39)
compile warnings on AsyncTask Statistic Interface (d7f4b4d)
AsyncTask flags mistakenly assigned as LocalUserNum (2856180)
missing include headers when the project doesn't use shared precompiled headers (adf825e)
chat: prevent crash when OnQueryChatRoomById_TriggerChatRoomMemberJoin returns failed (7db2fb0)
FOnlineAsyncTaskAccelByteConnectLobby call lobby connect success handler when lobby is already connected (9df72bf)
presence: bulk presence will need to requested multiple times if userIds over the limit (335aed1)
DS: expose metric exporter to session interface (8830406)
OnlineError: create OnlineErrorAccelByte as standart error model on oss (531f1b6)
support build without PCHs (a9f109c)
bump sdk to fix missing header in chat models (a1242ac)
User: change UserInfo's PublicId to PublicCode.
achievement oss (1c9fd59)
friend: add sync third party platform friend (82ae7af)
friend: invite friend using friendId (5436843)
User: add get and create user profile (d0a4188)
fix SDK cannot login from Odin launcher from UE5 project, replace the old function for getting environment variable with the new API. (91797fb)
userProfile: only add new auth user when it is their own account info (9ebae54)
analytics: remove login status check for SetTelemetrySendInterval and SetTelemetryImmediateEventList (0ca75ed)
fix SDK cannot login from Odin launcher from UE5 project, replace the old function for getting environment variable with the new API. (1c5a2ce)
Friends: skip bulk presence and return true if friendlist is empty (5f27e90)
skip mpv2 server authentication when already authenticated on AutoLogin (12c2a47)
wrong UserId->ToString() usage to UserId->GetAccelByteId() (c7e92ef)
logout: on websocket/lobby disconnection, IdentityInterface Logout won't always be triggered. Only triggered on specific closure code
logout: prevent logout for specifc connection close status code (b3372ee)
cloudsave: add undef ONLINE_ERROR_NAMESPACE (4e63ebd)

sect2.title: ⚠ BREAKING CHANGES

listitem.para: changing delegate signature will breaks client's project who is already using these feature

sect2.para: Approved-by: Jonathan Eka Sulistya Putra Approved-by: Wijanarko Sukma Pamungkas Approved-by: Teoderikus Ferdian Yanottama Yatna Putra

listitem.para: asyncTasks: add asyncTask to inherit TselfPtr, change CreateRaw to CreateThreadSafeSelfPtr (8658341)
Merged in feature/JES-479-support-add-key-in-cloud-save-interface (pull request #230) (9946c5e), closes #230
DS: expose watchdog to session interface (d209400)
MMv2: add calls to manually start and stop backfilling (3f030c6)
MPv2: add party code generation and revoking, as well as join by party code (28188d2)
presence: add Away status presence (afb9737)
statistic: add query specific stats for ds (15c7e67)
statistic: fix querystats function, add querystats for ds (ac1ef9a)
statistic: query multi users multi stats for ds (a427753)
statistic: update emplace stats (6e992dc)
asyncTasks: add asyncTask to inherit TselfPtr, change CreateRaw to CreateThreadSafeSelfPtr (1a91132)
p2p: update networking status usage (64e71cf)
set LastTaskUpdateInSeconds to current time and fix float log (bc09b0d)
statistic: change statuser to NetIdAccelByte, change emplace loop to append (35754c8)
UniqueId: fix a bug where passing an AccelByte ID to CreateUniquePlayerId would return an invalid ID (08e3fdb)
asyncTask: change default shouldTimeOut to true (b96aa4c)
asyncTasks: add asyncTask to inherit TselfPtr, change CreateRaw to CreateThreadSafeSelfPtr (2e5a6cc)
MPv2: add delegate to notify when a kick player call has completed (165044c)
p2p: update hosting state in network manager when hosting p2p session (ca0eed5)
statistic: add create statitem for ds (a7d3cf6)
editor: crash on exit PIE instance due to invalid reference access (f7854f8)
invalid subsystem instance in the static delegate (a510b25)
MPv2: invalid usages of LocalOwnerId that could have side effects on servers (d735c89)
MPv2: joining a new session would not register players that were already joined to the session (67e2c5e)
cloudsave: replace replace user record callback with replace game record callback (8673968)
missing AES_BLOCK_SIZE when compiled in UE 5.1 (879e6e8)
bump sdk and network utilities to enable turn manager send metric (542feab)
cloudsave: add bulk get user record with FUniqueNetIds as param (a5ce304)
cloudsave: add GetPublicUserRecord for other userid (2bee89b)
cloudsave: GetUserRecord for server (c616006)
cloudsave: modify to separate request between client and server (f0d8e52)
Login: login using cached token (windows only) (797325b)
sessionV1: remove user from session in the channel (70127d3)
sessionV2: add get member's partyID in session info (7ad7ea5)
MPv2: fix issue where P2P connection was not setup on initial session join (684f409)
remove "client-" prefix when validating user id (63c5c90)
SessionV2: remove GetSimplifiedNativePlatformName when setting party creator platform type (3a43080)
targetted SDK submodule commit (b2cd876)
taskManager: print warning when MaxParallelTasks reached (b399135)
Revert "fix(user): add timeout on query user info, change to direct api request insteall of call another async task" (f21c9c2)
user: add timeout on query user info, change to direct api request insteall of call another async task (cc40837)
sessionV1: timeout occurred for an MM session (c4f5900)
users: only one user returned for multiple user query (bf2f7a2)
statistic: unable to find AsyncTask in non shipping build (01c9f8f)
statistic: compile error in shipping build because ResetStats async task is included (2737569)
MPv2: implement separate delegate for when an update to a session is received (4e2cf80)
MPv2: update create session and send game session invite calls to allow servers to make them (3a807f2)
MPv2: update create session and send game session invite calls to allow servers to make them (2898913)
party: change how initialize JoinInfo (fe4f61f)
revert some conflicted changes (7388a7c)
uniqueid: update types for FUniqueIdAccelByteResource and FUniqueIdAccelByteUser (dfe8bd6)
add chat interface and connect chat on login (7300b5a)
add GetFromSubsystem and GetFromWorld in FOnlineChatAccelByte (aae33b3)
add TextChat option on session (81a990f)
Bulk stats update on some users (031beae)
chat interface functions and events (0fe55de)
EOS: Support EOS login (launcher and accountPortal) (a5c6583)
friendPresence: Auto update friend presence. (d736994)
Get cached stats from a specified stats name and a specified user (3c9f6c4)
load last message for private message (9ae37a1)
matchmaking: set SETTING_GAMEMODE after getting match notif (this only works after AR-3776 done) (60997b7)
MMv2: implement setting to override session ID passed to created matchmaking ticket (c861fca)
Reset stats from a specified user (fa2d726)
sdk: move to latest sdk (31ec23d)
user: implement avatar URL to user accounts (155e0d2)
V1SessionInfo: add delegate call when retrieve session info (9eec43f)
add another case for Busy and Invisible. (44f6f7b)
add missing code (d756257)
add query room data after user successfully join a chat room (48ff9ba)
chat interface include (15bfea1)
chat: fix fstring initialization compile failure with ue5 (95fadcc)
deprecation warnings in FUniqueNetId during compilation (ed7203d)
implement GetChatInterface override method in OnlineSubsystemAccelByte (6d84315)
MMv2: fix refresh session on game server failing to update (aabf5bb)
MPv2: fix join session using potentially stale data for created session (f6d0d5b)
party: Presence party member (d124928)
register player V1 doesn't use any checking for dedicated server (6ac5c76)
restoreParty: fix restore party if failed to get member connect status (0f602b7)
room cache race condition (23fb5db)
wrong presence state when querying user presence (dbeebad)
implement script for automated build (a694fff)
Add UniqueNetId param in FOnlineChatAccelByte::RegisterChatDelegates and change accessablility it to PACKAGE_SCOPE (437a4e7)
move chat connect to chat interface (38b193a)
rename ConnectAccelByteChat to Connect (5686906)
MPv2: update create session and send game session invite calls to allow servers to make them (29b8408)
some methods are removed from the OSS Interfaces in Unreal Engine 5.1
Bulk query specified stats from specified users (5eeffe2)
Get cached stats from a specified user (bce2fca)
fix analytics renaming post merge (0282205)
change naming convention in analytics interface (0d6f3ea)
﻿feat: update implementation to support Unreal Engine 5.1 (b970957)
add chat interface and connect chat on login (ac170dc)
add GetFromSubsystem and GetFromWorld in FOnlineChatAccelByte (18659a7)
add TextChat option on session (1362a54)
chat interface functions and events (1c337dc)
load last message for private message (8699e1e)
add query room data after user successfully join a chat room (7304822)
chat interface include (01acb89)
chat: fix fstring initialization compile failure with ue5 (1e2e888)
implement GetChatInterface override method in OnlineSubsystemAccelByte (4073e57)
room cache race condition (b6b4017)
Add UniqueNetId param in FOnlineChatAccelByte::RegisterChatDelegates and change accessablility it to PACKAGE_SCOPE (a03c038)
move chat connect to chat interface (b4bca6e)
rename ConnectAccelByteChat to Connect (8f8c3b5)
add analytics interface (a01641d)
implement send telemetry in analytics interface (ca8cb4b)
Query all stats from a specified user & fix Bulk query specified stats from specified users (4ca7808)
Query specified stats from a specified user (f699068)
time: add time interface (f9f781d)
login: add condition to login with ps4 (48d2eed)
update both session min and max players if either has a new value (fe67736)
use session type in SDK, change EOnlineSessionTypeAccelByte to EAccelByteV2SessionType
add cloud save interface (760649d)
add match pool field to game session create and update (a7058de)
sessionV2: add delegate to notify if a session failed to get a DS (e0a38b8)
sessionV2: trigger OnSessionServerUpdate Delegate when get join session response with a DS ready. (32da370)
can not set max player (d54917a)
crash when static casting session model (a5fe09a)
double dereference of a string in Logging method (93b8427)
double include headers in StoreV2 interface (47ec4e5)
GetPlayerNickname crashes when failing to find a player (c1c9608)
handle trigger session join complete correctly (ad0f307)
remove encriptionkey from oss (9d8b0e0)
SessionV2: Rework V2 session updates (aec1298), closes #123
allow to override serverIP by using -serverip=xxx.xx.xx.xx commandline argument (a998102)
party: add join to party using party code (5243d27)
Presence: presence listening to lobby notif (009653f)
add some missing headers (8168adc)
log: change 's' to 'd' (56ae459)
sdk: update compatible sdk to ver 16.2.1 (cdc5964)
set outgoing HTTP header to indicated the OSS version (5ea4d2c)
fix v2 session deployment setting being sent to backend (351bc81)
log: change 's' to 'd' (0da7747)
add update session and OnRTCClosed delegate bringback from eville (723dc18)
friends: trigger some delegates on invite friend feature (3b95c95)
store: add query child categories (9b814ae)
store: add query item by sku (18e7b22)
store: add query item's dynamic data (2f512b8)
apiclient always null (e3fd85f)
fix UpdateGameSession and UpdateGameSessionSetting async to target session interface v1 (f8c8772)
move and rename UpdateGameSession & UpdateGameSettings async task (f800bba)
implicit conversion in CreateUniquePlayerId causes an issue (b613e9a)
Implements Multiplayer v2's Session (14464c7), closes #94
store v2: implement Online Store V2 Interfaces which handle store categories and items that can be purchased using in-game currency
entitlements: implement Online Entitlements Interfaces which handle entitlement and IAP purchases
purchase: implement Online Purchase Interfaces which handle purchase items using in-game currency
ue5: remove deprecation warnings with FUniqueNetId derived class
session: joinable session not working due to enqueue session is not implemented
identity: lobby websocket not disconnected during logout
oss: fix racing condition when the same user is logging in and out consecutively in short period of time
oss: remove singleton instance for several Online Interfaces to run in PIE mode
oss: move SetLocalUserNumCached, GetLocalUserNumCached and GetApiClient from Online Identity interface to the Subsystem class
identity: add new config bMultipleLocalUsersEnabled to enable or disable multiple local users support
identity: fix login with refresh token type
wallet: implement Online Wallet Interfaces which handle AccelByte Wallet services
oss: now supports UE5
session: trigger delegates on failed matchmaking
session: fix End Session to support matchmaking and p2p game session
session: fix Register and Unregister player to session
session: fix joinable game session
party: fix Online Party Interfaces implementation
linux build: fix linux build, move static struct outside the online agreement class
lobby: fix trigger on connect lobby always return false
agreement: implement Online Agreement Interfaces which handle AccelByte Agreement services
presence: player unable to set presence status
identity: implement Online Identity Interfaces such as login, logout and player profiles
party: implement Online Party Interfaces such as create party, kick member, etc.
friends: implement Online Friend Interfaces such as add and remove friends
presence: implement Online Presence Interfaces such as set presence status
session: implement Onlinbe Session Interfaces such as start matchmaking, create session, find sessions, join session, etc.
